column1: # ARIS skill catalog — single source of truth for selective install.

column5: <short-description>

column1: # <requires> = skills the entry actually exercises in a DEFAULT run:
#   (a) unconditional pipeline phases ("Invoke /x" with no gate);
#       audits) or documented-silent-skip (auto-render, W&B health checks):
#       a silent skip is silent feature loss, so it still belongs here;
#   (c) hard artifact prerequisites the skill errors out demanding
# NOT requires: opt-in flags/branches, "use X instead" alternatives,
# input-producers and downstream consumers, comparisons, doc links.
# "-" = none. Every edge was verified against the SKILL.md invocation site
# (#366 review pass); tests/test_skill_groups.py guards each edge textually.
# <short-description> = one concise line shown in the interactive picker /
# --list-groups. Every skills/<name>/SKILL.md must appear exactly once;
